opinion.h2: Aaron HENRY, petitioner, v. MISSISSIPPI. No. 539.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Robert L. Carter, Jawn A. Sandifer and Jack H. Young, for petitioner.
Joe T. Patterson, Atty. Gen. of Mississippi, and G. Garland Lyell, Jr ., Asst. Atty. Gen., for respondent.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Mississippi granted and case placed on the summary calendar.[ Henry v. Mississippi. (1964) ]
